# Uluwatu Paradise

> Luxury villa and apartment development in Uluwatu, Bali by Next Gen Home (NGH Property Group).

## About
Uluwatu Paradise is a premium property development project located in Uluwatu, Bali, Indonesia. We combine European expertise with authentic Balinese craftsmanship to create extraordinary living spaces. Our team has 10+ years of experience in real estate, investment, and construction.

## Location
Jl. Pantai Balangan, Ungasan, Kec. Kuta Sel., Kabupaten Badung, Bali 80361, Indonesia.
Uluwatu is known as the "Beverly Hills of Bali" — dramatic cliffs, world-class surf, and an increasingly sophisticated lifestyle scene.

## Property Types
- **One Bedroom Apartment**: Ideal for couples and digital nomads — from €112,500
- **Two Bedroom Apartment**: Perfect for families or investment property — from €265,000

## Amenities
Private gym, co-working space, sauna, jacuzzi, rooftop terrace, shared infinity pool, tropical landscaping, shaded lounges, rooftop gardens.

## Investment
- Expected ROI: 10-14% at ~70% occupancy
- Leasehold terms: 25-30 years with extension options
- Full property management services available
- Short-term and long-term rental management
